events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the reverse-lapped WRB (upper layer behind lower) reverses the intended shingle-style drainage path, directing water behind the barrier into the wall assembly — a **fail**, **high risk** defect per IRC R703 and standard manufacturer lap requirements. Work must stop and the affected courses must be corrected (proper upper-over-lower lap) before flashing integration or cladding proceeds.
